specific_question: Did Elexion see an increase of EV sales in 2024 after implementing the newest ADAS features?
answer: Yes, Elexion saw an 11% increase in total sales of electric vehicles throughout the entire year of 2024. This may be attributed to the newest ADAS features that were implemented in the purchased models.
dr_question: How well is Elexion positioned to adapt to and take advantage of AI and machine learning to advance our ADAS technology by June 2026 while providing a friendly end-user experience for our drivers?
